generated_oml:
instance LiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for vehicle environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudData
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node responsible for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions for all data streams prior to transmission over UDP"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslation
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslation
]

instance ProjectedPathDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslation
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and direction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path generated by the ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing real-time data processing and visualization capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks through a user interface with save and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler facilitating cloud-based computation offloading for ACC functionalities"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transferring ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation command generation from onboard ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionOffload, SpeedCalculationOffload, ActuationCommandGenerationOffload
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading lead vehicle detection computation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculationOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading speed calculation based on distance to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandGenerationOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading actuation command generation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler enabling remote control operations for system monitoring and troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote control operations such as enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and issuing emergency braking commands for operators and developers to monitor and troubleshoot the system"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance AccEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote operation to enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote operation to set the desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote operation to issue emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting general automotive functionality and physical resources"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity responsible for computational offloading and simulation"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on separate hardware hosting 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent for real-time data visualization"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent for remote control operations"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node responsible for clustering and tracking objects from LiDAR point cloud data"
]

instance AutomotiveEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Automotive environment for Adaptive Cruise Control applications"
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, UserEntity, PointCloudClusteringTracking, DataTranslation, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from ACC Controlling FE are processed by Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion, transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system enforces a 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy requirement for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, enabling computation offloading and coordination between devices as mandated by relevant standards."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with modifications, organizing software components into three entities (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) deployed on separate hardware. Each functional entity is implemented as individual ROS2 packages with nodes, where the Physical Twin Entity handles device communication, data pre-processing, and actuation, and the User Entity includes split subcomponents for visualization and control. System-wide coordination is maintained through ROS2 inter-process communication."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within ROS2 network; inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi network with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) representing physical manufacturing elements (e.g., equipment, facilities, products, personnel, processes), Data Collection and Device Control Entities for data collection and control, Digital Twin Entities for digital representation, and User Entities for user interaction (e.g., monitoring data or controlling OMEs). Each entity comprises Functional Entities responsible for specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable format, and user interfacing."
]
